classObjective: Identify and name the parts of an angle, including the vertex and sides.
workedExamples: 11-1, Example 1 — Identify Parts of an Angle and Use Proper Notation
warmUp: Draw an angle and label its vertex and sides
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: angle notation (∠ABC); vertex location; sides as rays; interior/exterior regions
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice identifying and naming angle parts with correct notation
independentPractice: Practice problems identifying angle components and using proper geometric notation
assessment: Exit ticket: identify the vertex and sides of ∠XYZ and write its measure notation
capReflection: How does angle notation help you precisely communicate which angle you mean?
